title: Rift Valley Geothermal: Well-Field Siting
strategies: overlap-blind top-K: drill wells at the K hottest cells (reproduces the evaluator's weak baseline; wells pile onto the tallest plume and re-tap the same cells)
overlap-blind window-sum: rank cells by the total heat inside their (2R+1)x(2R+1) tap window and pick the K best, valuing the whole region but still not discounting already-tapped heat

submodular marginal-gain greedy: build wells one at a time, each time choosing the cell whose window adds the most heat not yet tapped, so wells spread across separate plumes (1-1/e coverage guarantee)

greedy build plus local search: relocate individual wells to any free cell whenever it raises the union yield; seeded restarts / simulated annealing over the same objective squeeze out remaining overlap within the op budget
